//: A Terraform plan an AI agent (or SRE bot) proposes. Valqore's Agent Action Gate normalizes it and assesses blast-radius + cost before it can apply.
//try: docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work ghcr.io/valqore/engine:latest valqore agent-gate run --tf-plan /work/examples/agent-gate/terraform-plan.json --agent sre-bot --max-blast-radius medium
//expect: blast_radius=high (a delete plus a 0.0.0.0/0 security group) exceeds the 'medium' cap -> BLOCK (exit code 2). Add --request-approval to mint a signed approval request recorded in the agent-gate journal.
